text:
This article is about the Fullmetal Alchemist episode. For the taboo, see Human Transmutation.
Human Transmutation is the 46th episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

Al meets with Tucker, and Ed scours Dante's mansion for clues that could lead him to the homunculi's leader. Meanwhile, the Führer sends Mustang and Armstrong to command his northern campaign.

Trivia

This is the first episode where Edward does alchemy without clasping his hands together or using a transmutation circle. During his struggle with Wrath, Ed's automail hand is missing, so he instead slides his left hand across the end of his arm to use alchemy.
